notes: Fixes a macOS 26 startup crash caused by reframing an already borderless window.
Adds a branded drag-to-Applications DMG with the DingDong logo, an installation arrow, and an in-volume permissions guide.
Explains first launch, Accessibility, clipboard, and login-item permissions without requesting unrelated access.
Adds guided GitHub forms for problem reports and feature requests, with privacy reminders.
Adds optional, off-by-default Aptabase diagnostics that never include clipboard content, paths, messages, or stack traces.
